title: Discord Emoji
description: An emoji in Discord, either a custom guild emoji or a standard Unicode emoji used in messages, reactions, and components.

id.description: Emoji ID (null for standard Unicode emojis)

name.description: Emoji name (can be null for reaction emoji objects)

roles.description: Roles allowed to use this emoji

require_colons.description: Whether this emoji must be wrapped in colons

managed.description: Whether this emoji is managed by an integration

available.description: Whether this emoji can be used (may be false due to server boost loss)
